0.text: Diffuse mild central bronchial ectasia in both lungs

1.text: Scarring at the apex of both lungs

2.text: Multiple subcentimeter nodules in both lungs, largest measuring 6x3 mm

3.text: Pleural-based nodule in the lateral segment of the right middle lobe

4.text: Uniform interlobular septal thickening in both lungs
